programme.title: Night Sky
programme.desc: Venture on a relaxing night time journey.

programme.title: Flowers
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination.

programme.title: Close Your Eyes
programme.desc: Close your eyes, sit back, and relax. It's time to go to bed.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come pick potatoes with your favorite BabyTV friends _ Hippo, elephant, Squirrel, Rabbit and Baby!

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Good Night!
programme.desc: Say good night to the day and recharge yourself with a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Flowers
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Ocean's coral reefs.

programme.title: Magic Stars
programme.desc: Let's slow down and change gears.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Lola has fun staying home playing with her pets. She throws her dog a stick and gives some milk to her cat. Pets are fun!

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Night Sky
programme.desc: Venture on a relaxing night time journey.

programme.title: Flowers
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Shooting Star
programme.desc: A relaxing journey with BabyTV's loveable charcters.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Ocean's coral reefs.

programme.title: Starry Nights
programme.desc: Look at the moon and the beautiful stars and take it slow.

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Magic Stars
programme.desc: Let's slow down and change gears.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Ocean's coral reefs.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The Tiny Bunch gang are happy, and they know it! Baby, Elephant, Rabbit, Giraffe, Hippo and Turtle all join in to sing and dance "If You're Happy and You Know It"! Come join them!

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: Calming visuals of abstract objects and nature, accompanied by soothing music for night time programming

programme.title: Good Night!
programme.desc: Say good night to the day and recharge yourself with a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Shooting Star
programme.desc: A relaxing journey with BabyTV's loveable charcters.

programme.title: Starry Nights
programme.desc: Look at the moon and the beautiful stars and take it slow.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Ocean's coral reefs.

programme.title: Time for bed
programme.desc: I'ts time for a peaceful night full of wonderful dreams.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Starry Nights
programme.desc: Look at the moon and the beautiful stars and take it slow.

programme.title: Night Sky
programme.desc: Venture on a relaxing night time journey.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.

programme.title: Night Sky
programme.desc: Venture on a relaxing night time journey.

programme.title: Time for bed
programme.desc: I'ts time for a peaceful night full of wonderful dreams.

programme.title: Close Your Eyes
programme.desc: Close your eyes, sit back, and relax. It's time to go to bed.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: What's more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters _ Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!

programme.title: Starry Nights
programme.desc: Look at the moon and the beautiful stars and take it slow.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Night Sky
programme.desc: Venture on a relaxing night time journey.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Do you like the sun? All the children want to play with Mr. Golden Sun. Let's ask him to shine down and play with us!

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Good Night!
programme.desc: Say good night to the day and recharge yourself with a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Magic Stars
programme.desc: Let's slow down and change gears.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: Calming visuals of abstract objects and nature, accompanied by soothing music for night time programming

programme.title: Starry Nights
programme.desc: Look at the moon and the beautiful stars and take it slow.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Billy and Bam have fun watching the bears make food together. Sometimes things don't go quite as expected but that's part of the fun.

programme.title: Time for bed
programme.desc: I'ts time for a peaceful night full of wonderful dreams.

programme.title: Shooting Star
programme.desc: A relaxing journey with BabyTV's loveable charcters.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: Calming visuals of abstract objects and nature, accompanied by soothing music for night time programming

programme.title: Close Your Eyes
programme.desc: Close your eyes, sit back, and relax. It's time to go to bed.

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Cabin in the Woods is a popular and fun song that teaches toddlers and young children colors and shapes with yummy fruits. Join Baby TV's friends as they have fun learning and eating a strawberry, a banana, a plum, and an apple together.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Billy and Bam play with a balloon. When the balloon flies off the siblings run after it. Will they be able to get their balloon back?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ciao, Konnichi wa, Marhaba _ "Hello" has different names _ in Italian, Japanese or Arabic. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Squirrel is sleeping soundly when the fairy Ki takes him on a magical journey in the sky. Join them as they float through the stars and the moon.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Lola, Charlie and Henry are baking a delicous cake together. Come find out what you need in order to make the perfect cake!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Rabbit Jack leaves his front door open and catches a cold. He can't stop sneezing. His good friend Elephant makes him a hot cup of tea.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Starry Nights
programme.desc: Look at the moon and the beautiful stars and take it slow.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: It's Robbie's birthday and everyone has come to celebrate with him _ Toto, Dolly, the ducks, Horse, Elephant and Cow. Come join the celebration as they all sing him a birthday song, eat cake and enjoy his gift.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Oliver learns when he needs to wash his hands _ before eating, after going to the potty, and after playing with his good friend Lola.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Join BabyTV in this classic version of The Muffin Man that introduces your little ones to the adorable muffin man delivering baked goods all around town.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Hippo, Elephant, Baby and Sheep all star in this fun and entertaining rendition of the all-time favorite nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ola, bonjour, hello _ "Hello" has different names _ in English, French or Spanish. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out _ Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Baby Butterfly and all your favorite friends are here to sing and dance to Here We Go Looby Loo. Come on and join Hippo, Elephant, Giraffe and more and do the Looby loo!

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: Calming visuals of abstract objects and nature, accompanied by soothing music for night time programming

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come ride through the town with your favorite BabyTV characters _ Baby Butterfly, Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep, Rabit and Squirrel. Riding a bus has never been more fun!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Meet the clever little teapot, short and stout. It has a little handle and spout, and when it sings and whistles, just pour it out.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Mother Duck goes out with her five little ducklings. Each one is fascinated by something along the way. Luckily, they all find their way back in the end.

programme.title: Magic Stars
programme.desc: Let's slow down and change gears.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Charlie has fun in the Bath! Join him as he washes his hair, scrubs himself with soap, makes bubbles and plays with his rubber duck. When he's nice and clean he puts on his pajamas and goes to bed. Good night Charlie!

programme.title: Let's Dance
programme.desc: Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!

programme.title: Draco
programme.desc: Join Draco as he learns the difference between opposites _ dirty and clean. After getting dirty from playing in the mud, Draco takes a good long bath and comes out clean. He even gives his cute teddy bear a bath and they both are clean as can be!

programme.title: Stitches
programme.desc: Needles and Bouncy each build with building blocks. Needles builds a very tall tower and Bouncy builds a bridge. Bouncy gets carried away with all his bouncing and accidently topples over Needles' tower. The two learn to build together!

programme.title: Maya and Yaya
programme.desc: Maya and Yaya bake a delicious cake in honour of their friend Momo's upcoming visit. While Yaya goes to bring plates, spoons and napkins, Maya keeps an eye on the cake but winds up eating it all up! Join the two cute elephants to see the surprise that Momo brings along _ a brand new cake!

programme.title: By the Lake
programme.desc: Your kids will love to relax with BabyTV's characters in a beautiful park with soothing classical music.

programme.title: Magic World
programme.desc: Your kids will love to relax with BabyTV's characters in a beautiful park with soothing classical music.

programme.title: Peek-a-boo with friends
programme.desc: Your kids will love to relax with BabyTV's characters in a beautiful park with soothing classical music.

programme.title: Playing in the Park
programme.desc: Your kids will love to relax with BabyTV's characters in a beautiful park with soothing classical music.

programme.title: River
programme.desc: Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, amid the Ocean's coral reefs or gently lift up in a hot air balloon. Enjoy the programme's tranquil pacing and a rich soundtrack.

programme.title: Charlie & the Alphabet
programme.desc: The letter R has created a friendly giant robot. Charlie and the robot quickly become friends. Will Charlie manage to get to the alphabet party in time when the robot begins to malfunction?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Lola has fun with all your favorite characters from the Tiny Bunch. Come join them as they sing the favorite classic "This Old Man".

programme.title: Mini Matinee
programme.desc: Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Scotland. Kenny plays his pipe but one day it is lost! His family brings him many pipes. Which should he use? See how he connects them to create a bagpipe!

programme.title: Beep Beep
programme.desc: Roady and Trucky surprise Voom Vam on a cold Winter's day. Instead of being stuck inside all day, the adventurous gang go skating on the frozen lake! But things don't go according to plan....

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Charlie, Lola and all their animal friends come together in this fun and humorous rendition of The Farmer in the Dell.

programme.title: Gee-Raffa
programme.desc: Ostrich comes back from the beach soaking wet. Raffa won't let her lay in his hammock until she dries off. Will she find something to dry her off?

programme.title: Walter & Dude
programme.desc: Walter and Dude are looking for an item that is round, has a hole and helps you swim. Is it a bagel, a rubber duckie or a balloon? Join them as they discover it's a rubber ring!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Playing ball with Draco is fun. When the ball flies over the mountain the bear goes over the mountain to look for it. What will he find?

programme.title: Olly
programme.desc: Olly and Kitty are putting on a dance show with skates but Kitty has forgotten her skates! Come see how Olly saves the day

programme.title: Bug'n'Play to the Rescue
programme.desc: Laz, Hop and Butterson find a creative way to make a waterslide in the back yard. The fun ends when the tap is stuck and the waterflow stops. The buggy friends manage to turn it back on with a shoelace! Let the fun continue!

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Do you like horseback riding, singing and having lots of fun? Join Little Lola, Charlie, Hungry Henry and friends in this fun and cheerful classic folk song. Let's ride together! Yay!

programme.title: The Cuddlies
programme.desc: Uh Oh, Dodo and Yum Yum startle a frog even though they didn't mean to. Join Tickles as he takes the frog to the safest place for frogs _ the lake, and join them as they jump!

programme.title: Bath Tubbies
programme.desc: The friends want to play ball but the tub is full of toys! Join them as they put the toys in a bucket! Come along and help them find the ball! It's time to play and tidy up again!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.

programme.title: Exploring with Oliver
programme.desc: What will Oliver find at the vegetable garden? Join Oliver as he has fun watering lettuce and picking fresh vegetables! Come along and see how scarecrow takes Oliver on a fun ride in the wheelbarrow!

programme.title: Draco
programme.desc: Join Draco as he learns the difference between opposites _ under and on. As he tries to figure out how to play with a jumping ball, he has lots of fun understanding what it means to sit under a jumping ball and to sit and bounce on one!

programme.title: The World is a Wonder
programme.desc: Explore the peach tree as it changes by season! Summer peaches are ripe. In the fall, leaves change colors! Snow covers the tree in winter! Spring's flowers turn into peaches!

programme.title: Zeina's Detective Agency
programme.desc: A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeina's doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the object's true use is revealed to them.

programme.title: Welcome to the Island
programme.desc: When a caterpillar comes to visit the island, things get a little out of hand as Lily accidentally throws him off her after a fit of laughter. All's well that ends well as the foursome get to see the amazing transformation of the caterpillar into a beautiful butterfly

programme.title: Teeny & Tiny's Classroom
programme.desc: Teeny and Tiny use their imagination together, play the music game and ""what's hiding beneath the handkerchief.

programme.title: Mike's Bikes
programme.desc: Petite is dressed up as a cute little mouse and she wants her bike to be dressed up, too. Will Mikey have a costume for her bike?

programme.title: Stick with Mick
programme.desc: Mick is on his way to clean his house. Grab a dust cloth and join Mick as he sweeps the house with a broom and has fun using it to giddy up on a horse. Collect dirt with Mick using a dustpan and throw it in the garbage can and enjoy a clean and beautiful house!

programme.title: Crafty Rafty
programme.desc: Come along and have lots of fun with office supplies! Enter a fantasy world with pencil bridges, paper clouds, coloured trees and pencil shaving butterflies! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates a green paper frog with a paper clip tongue!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come sing and dance along with Lola, Charlie, Billy and Bam Bam as they touch their head, nose, chin and arms!

programme.title: Billy Bam Bam
programme.desc: Billy and Bam Bam enjoy working together in the garden pulling out weeds. Join them as they have fun watering the flowers and pretending to be elephants using the watering hoses as trunks!

programme.title: The Jungle Book
programme.desc: It's pineapple day! What does that mean? It's the day the great pineapple ripens and all the animals fest on it together near the lake. But the mischievous Shere-Khan has plans of his own for the great pineapple....

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The ants march along carrying cherries, oranges and other goodies from the picnic basket and find shelter from the rain.

programme.title: Look What I Found
programme.desc: The friends listen to music on the radio as the radio turns into a robot in space. The friends get to know the robot and dance with it until more robot friends arrive and they leave on a spaceship.

programme.title: The Lollipops Song Series
programme.desc: The Lollipops Song Series

programme.title: Hungry Henry
programme.desc: Henry wants to eat a stuffed pepper but Chef George is out of peppers. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find peppers. There aren't any at the supermarket or in the market, but there are peppers in the field, where they grow! Come along and enjoy a stuffed pepper with Henry!

programme.title: Mice builders
programme.desc: Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! What's inside the package? A computer mouse to use with a computer!

programme.title: Pix & Leo
programme.desc: Leo and Pix are looking for the perfect place to have a picnic. While Leo takes a nap, Pix finds a new friend to play with.

programme.title: My Robot & I
programme.desc: Kim and Kit try to figure out where a squeaky noise is coming from. Could it be coming from Kit? Join Kim as she takes Kit apart. Will she be able to put him back together?

programme.title: Walter & Dude
programme.desc: Walter and Dude are looking for an item that protects eyes from the sun and that you look through. Is it a parasol or a magnifying glass? Join them as they discover sunglasses!

programme.title: Exploring with Oliver
programme.desc: What will Oliver discover in the cowshed? Join Oliver as he finds out what's behind the hay stacks! A cow, of course! Come along as Oliver has fun imitating a moo sound, milking a cow and drinking fresh milk! Moo!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Billy and Bam play with a balloon. When the balloon flies off the siblings run after it. Will they be able to get their balloon back?

programme.title: Mona & Sketch
programme.desc: Join Mona and Sketch as they set out on an adventure to become engine drivers! Join the fun as Sketch scribbles an engine, train cars and passengers! What's missing? An engine driver suit, of course! Come along and help create sky diving parachutes when the train runs out of tracks!

programme.title: Hungry Henry
programme.desc: Henry wants to eat a slice of cold melon but Chef George is out of melons. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find melons. There aren't any at the supermarket or in the market, but there are melons in the field, where they grow! Come along and enjoy fresh melon with Henry!

programme.title: Travelers
programme.desc: It's not easy falling asleep when someone in the room is singing or playing the guitar? What can you do? Join them and have a pajama party!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ola, bonjour, hello _ "Hello" has different names _ in English, French or Spanish. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Charlie & the Numbers
programme.desc: Join Number One, Number Three and Charlie as they try to help the little chick get back into his nest. After the tower of blocks they built falls down, Charlie climbs on the dragon's back and brings the chick back home to reunite with his family.

programme.title: Little Lola Visits the City
programme.desc: Peter and Elephant play soccer in the park when their ball gets stuck in the tree. How will they get it down? Lola takes a ride on a bus, Max feeds birds in the park and Maria and Peter go shopping at the grocery store.

programme.title: Giggle Wiggle
programme.desc: Have you ever danced in the forest with a penguin? Now you can! Come on _ one hand in, one hand out _ shake them all about!

programme.title: Snail Trail
programme.desc: Mr. Snail discovers a nest on a porch! Join him as he sees a cute little chick hatch from its egg! Where's mother bird? She went to bring food, of course! Come along and find out how the chick hatches and why it chirps! See mother bird feed her chick a worm in order to get strong and fly! Good Bye!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: What's more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters _ Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Bug'n'Play to the Rescue
programme.desc: Laz gets stuck in a hole in the fence after trying to save Hop's hat. Hop and Butterson go on a wild ride in a paper airplane to try and save her.

programme.title: Dino & the Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Dino & the Egg Hunt

programme.title: The Lollipops Song Series
programme.desc: The Lollipops Song Series

programme.title: Zeina's Detective Agency
programme.desc: A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeina's doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the object's true use is revealed to them.

programme.title: Billy Bam Bam
programme.desc: Billy and BamBam go out to the garden to take down the washing. Join them as they have fun playing an imaginative game with the washing basket, turning it into a boat, splashing with paddles and sailing the sea!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Hippo goes on a walk down by the bay where he meets a bear combing his hair, a cat wearing a hat, a goose kissing a moose and so much more!

programme.title: Dino & the Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Dino & the Egg Hunt

programme.title: Charlie & the Shapes
programme.desc: Charlie and Arrow go in search of water in order to water the wilted flowers. They go in search of spiral who helps bring over some clouds. How will they get the clouds to bring down rain? By tickling them of course!

programme.title: The Cuddlies
programme.desc: The friends are on their way to the boat parade to sail their boats, but all the boats sink. Join Dodo as he builds a paper sailboat and fills the lake with many floating boats!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out _ Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.

programme.title: Mike's Bikes
programme.desc: Mike's bike shop is a place everyone goes to when they have a problem to solve. Be it big or small, Mike is always there to help his friends with his unique, quirky, and funny inventions, that put a smile on everyone's face. The series puts a new spin on the phrase – "if at first you don't succeed – try and try again" (and again, and again).

programme.title: Pix & Leo
programme.desc: Pix and Leo make friends with a cute little duckling but the poor duckling can't find his family. Come see how Pix and Leo help out.

programme.title: Olly
programme.desc: Make way for Olly the doctor who is on his way to cure Dolly. Does she need a band aid? Some rest? Maybe some tickling?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!

programme.title: Beep Beep
programme.desc: Voom Vam and Snailey compete in a race. While Snailey does his best, Voom Vam is much faster. When Voom Vam gets sidetracked and falls asleep, Snailey has a real shot at winning the race!

programme.title: Crafty Rafty
programme.desc: Come along and have lots of fun with socks! Discover the amazing undersea world! Swim with sock fish among colourful sock coral reefs! Enjoy the small fish made of clothespins and blow button bubbles! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates a crab from a sock with button eyes and pin claws!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come pick potatoes with your favorite BabyTV friends _ Hippo, elephant, Squirrel, Rabbit and Baby!

programme.title: My Robot & I
programme.desc: Kim and Kit race each other to the finish line. Pretty soon Kim realizes racing against a robot isn't such a great idea...

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Mini Matinee
programme.desc: Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Canada. The friends want to eat pancakes but have no peanut butter! Find out the forest guard's secret about maple trees and taste sweet maple syrup!

programme.title: Charlie's World
programme.desc: Charlie wants to play with the green ball but it keeps disappearing! Is it in the apple tree? Maybe inside the cabbage patch? Come help Charlie look

programme.title: The World is a Wonder
programme.desc: Join Gaya the Fairy as she explores the sunflower, its growth, and how the sunflower follows _ the sun.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ciao, Konnichi wa, Marhaba _ "Hello" has different names _ in Italian, Japanese or Arabic. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Mice builders
programme.desc: Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! What's inside the package? A rocking horse to ride on and have a fun time!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Lola and Charlie have fun with the animals on the farm. Join them in this classic rendition of Old McDonald. Don't forget to "moo moo" and "oink oink"!

programme.title: Tiny Bunch
programme.desc: Baby tries to find out who left her freshly squeezed orange juice. She follows the large footprints to try and find out.

programme.title: What a Wonderful Day
programme.desc: Join the wonderful friends as they greet a new morning of fun! Wake up, wash your face and brush your hair! Enjoy a delicious breakfast with fresh milk, toast and strawberry jam! Tuck in your shirt, tie your shoes and have a great day!

programme.title: Stick with Mick
programme.desc: Mick wants to play with his new doggie. Join Mick as he has lots of fun playing "fetch the ball" with his doggie, giving him water in a water bowl, entering the dog house along with his doggie and takings him on a nice walk using a leash!

programme.title: BabyTV Studios
programme.desc: How would your child do in a running contest against Draco and Mr. Snail? Come find out in this fun and exciting running contest.

programme.title: Walter & Dude
programme.desc: Walter and Dude the Dog are looking for an item that is white, round, hard on the outside, and is needed in baking their cake. Is it paper, a drum, or perhaps a tortoise? Join the two friends as they discover it's an egg!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Lola, Charlie and Henry are baking a delicous cake together. Come find out what you need in order to make the perfect cake!

programme.title: Mona & Sketch
programme.desc: Join Mona and Sketch as they set out on an adventure to become painters! Join the fun as Sketch scribbles a paintbrush and paints! What's missing? A painter's overalls, of course! Colour a picture and get covered with lots of paint! Water the flowers and trees in the picture and see them bloom and grow!

programme.title: Hungry Henry
programme.desc: Henry wants to eat baked sweet potatoes but Chef George is out of sweet potatoes. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find sweet potatoes. There aren't any at the supermarket or in the market, but there are sweet potatoes in the field, where they grow! Come along and enjoy tasty sweet potatoes with Henry!

programme.title: Travelers
programme.desc: It's Harley's birthday and Perry is throwing her a surprise party! Harley keeps on showing up while Perry is trying to decorate. Will Perry manage to surprise Harley?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Charlie has fun in the Bath! Join him as he washes his hair, scrubs himself with soap, makes bubbles and plays with his rubber duck. When he's nice and clean he puts on his pajamas and goes to bed. Good night Charlie!

programme.title: Charlie & the Numbers
programme.desc: Join Charlie as he tries to help Number Eight find eight sheep that disappeared from his story with the help of a surprise friend-the green dragon, who helps bring back the sheep to the book. Then set out with them to have fun at the Numbers Party!

programme.title: Little Lola Visits the City
programme.desc: Giraffe and Elephant play soccer in the park when their ball gets stuck in the tree. How will they get it down? Lola takes a ride on a bus, Grandpa feeds birds in the park and the elephants go shopping at the grocery store.

programme.title: Giggle Wiggle
programme.desc: Did you know seals love to dance? Now you can dance along! Don't forget to raise your flippers, jump, turn and clap!

programme.title: Snail Trail
programme.desc: Mr. Snail and country mouse are visiting city mouse in the city! Join them as they discover tasty cheese in the rubbish! Cat discovers the cheese as well! Who will enjoy the feast?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Hippo, Elephant, Baby and Sheep all star in this fun and entertaining rendition of the all-time favorite nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Bug'n'Play to the Rescue
programme.desc: Laz, Hop and Butterson compete in the long jump. Hop jumps a little too high and finds himself stuck in a spider's web. When Laz tries to help out, she gets stuck as well! Now it's up to Butterson to save the day

programme.title: The Lollipops Song Series
programme.desc: The Lollipops Song Series

programme.title: Exploring with Oliver
programme.desc: What will Oliver find at the sunny beach? Join Oliver as he has fun digging and drawing in the sand! Come along and see Oliver as he jumps in the colourful buckets and enjoys sailing on the sea! Ship Ahoy!

programme.title: Zeina's Detective Agency
programme.desc: A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeina's doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the object's true use is revealed to them.

programme.title: Billy Bam Bam
programme.desc: Billy and BamBam enjoy drawing a sun, grass and a colourful rainbow with their beautiful coloured pencils. Join them as they turn their colouring boxes into rattles and dance along with them at the carnival!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Hippo goes on a walk down by the bay where he meets a bear combing his hair, a cat wearing a hat, a goose kissing a moose and so much more!

programme.title: Dino & the Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Dino & the Egg Hunt

programme.title: Snowies fun and frosty guessing games
programme.desc: Snowies fun and frosty guessing games

programme.title: Charlie & the Shapes
programme.desc: Can you stand on your head? Come see blue triangle, orange triangle and line compete who can stand on their head the longest. When the shapes start to argue, Charlie needs to find them a game in which they don't compete.

programme.title: The Cuddlies
programme.desc: The friends are dancing except for Uh Oh who is home alone. When Yum Yum comes to see him, Uh Oh says he can't dance so Yum Yum teaches him and all the friends dance together!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: "One, two, buckle my shoe; Three, four, shut the door…" Counting is the best! Let's join Charlie & the Numbers in this popular and cheerful song and count from one to ten.

programme.title: Mike's Bikes
programme.desc: Mike's bike shop is a place everyone goes to when they have a problem to solve. Be it big or small, Mike is always there to help his friends with his unique, quirky, and funny inventions, that put a smile on everyone's face. The series puts a new spin on the phrase – "if at first you don't succeed – try and try again" (and again, and again).

programme.title: Pix & Leo
programme.desc: Pix and Leo want to get to the fruit across the river. They notice Beaver busy building his dam. Can Beaver help them cross the river and get to the yummy fruit?

programme.title: Olly
programme.desc: Olly the police detective has a mystery to solve _ who stole Dolly's ball?

programme.title: Beep Beep
programme.desc: Roady, Trucky and Voom Vam go to the beach to cool off on a hot summer's day. When they get to the beach, they hear a bird stuck on the littered beach. The friends quickly clean up the beach to help the bird.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Baby butterfly picks roses and meets friends along the way _ Hippo, Elephant, Turtle and more. Careful not to sneeze!

programme.title: Crafty Rafty
programme.desc: Come be creative with paper! There are so many things you can make using paper _ a cow, a sheep, a bird and a lovely orange cat stuck in a tree. Come see how the other animals come to the rescue.

programme.title: My Robot & I
programme.desc: Kim takes Kit to the beach for the first time and teaches him how to build sandcastles.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Baby Butterfly and all your favorite friends are here to sing and dance to Here We Go Looby Loo. Come on and join Hippo, Elephant, Giraffe and more and do the Looby loo!

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Mini Matinee
programme.desc: Join the loveable animal friends as they visit a Norwegian seaside. Fiona and her children go sailing! See Hans build a tall lighthouse with fireflies who light it up so that the family can reunite!

programme.title: Charlie's World
programme.desc: Charlie wants to play on the seesaw but who is he going to play with? Everyone! Kittens, squirrels, toads and even an elephant join Charlie on the seesaw!

programme.title: The World is a Wonder
programme.desc: What a beautiful day! Join Gaya the Fairy as she follows the fluttering butterflies, their lifecycle and how a tiny cocoon turns into pupa and then to a colorful butterfly.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come clap your hands and stomp your feet with Lola as she rides horses and goes on a picnic with grandpa and grandma.

programme.title: Mice builders
programme.desc: Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! What's inside the package? An alarm clock to help wake up in the morning!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!

programme.title: Tiny Bunch
programme.desc: Baby helps Turtle look for the loud sound that was keeping him up at night. Was it Giraffe playing the drums? Squirrel eating acorns? Come find out!

programme.title: What a Wonderful Day
programme.desc: It's lunch time! Join the wonderful friends as they enjoy lunch in the middle of the day! Have a seat and eat a yummy lunch that fills up your tummy! Peas, broccoli and a tasty beet! Oh, what a treat! Take cute teddy in your lap and have a lovely nap!

programme.title: Stick with Mick
programme.desc: Mick is going for a ride on his new bicycle. Join Mick as he puts his cute monkey in the bike basket! Come along and help Mick wear his helmet and ring the bicycle bell so the turtle can move out of the way! Grab a water bottle and join the fun ride!

programme.title: BabyTV Studios
programme.desc: Take a ride on the ski lift and hit the slopes with Zoe and Dodo. A great day of skiing always ends with a snowball fight!

programme.title: Charlie & the Alphabet
programme.desc: Y is the happiest letter of the alphabet. Why? Because she's yellow! She wants to paint all the letters of the alphabet yellow so they can all be happy as well. Will Charlie be able to talk her out of it or will she paint him yellow as well?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: All My Friends is a fun and cheerful children's rhyme with Lola, Charlie, Henry, Oliver, and Draco signing happily together about friends.

programme.title: Mini Matinee
programme.desc: Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Denmark. The King asks his daughters to bring him the most beautiful crown in the world! Come along and see which crown the King chooses!

programme.title: Beep Beep
programme.desc: Trucky goes to clear some rocks that fell on the road. While trying to pick up a large boulder he turns over on his side and can't get up. Now it's Roady and Voom Vam's turn to help Trucky in his time of need.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Playing ball with Draco is fun. When the ball flies over the mountain the bear goes over the mountain to look for it. What will he find?

programme.title: Travelers
programme.desc: On your marks, get set, go! Harley and Perry are off on a race in their rubber duck boats. Harley is out to win and isn't playing fair. Come find out we win the race!

programme.title: Walter & Dude
programme.desc: Walter and Dude the Dog are looking for an item that is yellow, cute, and squeaks. Is it a banana, a toy car, or perhaps Walter himself? Join the two friends as they discover it's a rubber duckie bath toy!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Cabin in the Woods is a popular and fun song that teaches toddlers and young children colors and shapes with yummy fruits. Join Baby TV's friends as they have fun learning and eating a strawberry, a banana, a plum, and an apple together.

programme.title: Olly
programme.desc: Olly's adventure is out of this world! He's flying to the moon and Kitty, Dolly and Snail join in on the fun!

programme.title: Bug'n'Play to the Rescue
programme.desc: The three buggies play hide and seek. Will Hop be able to find Laz and Butterson? And will Butterson be able to get out of his hiding place? You don't want to miss out on the fun.

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: The Lollipops Song Series
programme.desc: The Lollipops Song Series

programme.title: The Cuddlies
programme.desc: The friends put on a special circus show. Join Dodo in an amazing hula hoop act, Uh Oh as he attempts to walk the tight rope, Yum Yum in an exciting unicycle performance and Tickles in a fascinating trampoline show! Let the show begin!

programme.title: Bath Tubbies
programme.desc: Ellie and Ducky are having fun playing with paint! Ellie wants to sleep but is covered with paint splashes! What shall he do? Join Ellie and Ducky as they clean themselves in the bath. Oh no! Ellie still can't sleep, but once Ducky returns, Ellie can finally fall asleep! Good Night!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: London Bridge is falling down and everyone is here to help out _ Lola, Charlie, Draco, Ollie, Billy and Bam Bam.

programme.title: Exploring with Oliver
programme.desc: What will Oliver discover in the flower field? Join Oliver as he has fun watering and picking beautiful flowers! Come along and sit on a big flower with Oliver and help find the happy bees! Where can they be?

programme.title: Charlie's World
programme.desc: Charlie is already a big boy and he can do many things by himself! He can ride a bike, tie his shoes, count to 10 and even get dressed. Can you?

programme.title: The World is a Wonder
programme.desc: Join Gaya the Fairy as she explores Antarctica's faraway continent, the little penguin family, their cold habitat, food, and lifecycle.

programme.title: Zeina's Detective Agency
programme.desc: A highly familiar day-to-day object arrives at Zeina's doorstep forgetting what it is used for. Searching for the answer, Zeina and her best friend Roy come up with a new and hilarious use for the surprised object. While they all have a great time with its new use, the object's true use is revealed to them.

programme.title: Mona & Sketch
programme.desc: Join Mona and Sketch as they set out on an adventure to become gardeners! Join the fun as Sketch scribbles a rake and a trowel! What's missing? A gardener's outfit, of course! Enter the garden and plant and water flowers! Come along and help solve the garden hose mystery!

programme.title: Little Lola Visits the City
programme.desc: Lola learns you need to stop when the traffic light is red, meets a bird on the Ferris wheel, helps Bear get to the balloon shop and the park, has fun at the skatepark, and joins Max and Giraffe at the race track.

programme.title: Mike's Bikes
programme.desc: Petite and her little sister Bonbon are on their way to ballet class. But Bonbon is getting too heavy to carry and Petite can't give her a ride anymore. Can Mikey help?

programme.title: Stick with Mick
programme.desc: Mick sets out to enjoy a nice walk in the park on a beautiful day. Join Mick as he rides a bicycle, sails a boat in the water, sees a white swan, and flies a kite high up in the sky!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Songs & Rhymes (remake)

programme.title: Crafty Rafty
programme.desc: Have lots of fun with paper bags! Create an elegant elephant and merry mouse with paper bags! Enjoy cherry picking with mouse and cat! Yummy! Meet the turkey family and play with cracked egg shells! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates a lovely house from a paper bag! Home sweet home!

programme.title: Billy Bam Bam
programme.desc: Billy and BamBam enjoy having a picnic together. Join them as they find creative ways to play games with a bowl and stick, prepare a cake, dancing, singing and spinning the bowl just like in the circus!

programme.title: Tiny Bunch
programme.desc: Giraffe and Baby want to sing the friendship song together. Pretty soon the entire bunch are singing and playing to the catchy tune.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The brave mouse wants to join his friend the bird on the cuckoo clock. He tries climbing, jumping, and flying until he finally manages to unite with his friend.

programme.title: Dino & the Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Dino & the Egg Hunt

programme.title: The Lollipops Song Series
programme.desc: The Lollipops Song Series

programme.title: Hungry Henry
programme.desc: Henry wants to drink chilled orange juice but Chef George is out of it. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find oranges. There aren't any at the grocery store or at the packing house, but there are lots of oranges on trees in the orchard, where oranges grows! Come along, pick some oranges and enjoy freshly squeezed orange juice with Henry!

programme.title: Mice builders
programme.desc: Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! What's inside the package? A candle to light up the room!

programme.title: Pix & Leo
programme.desc: What is everyone up to today? Mixing water and soap, making pink soap bubbles! It's fun to make bubbles, but it's much more fun to float in them.

programme.title: My Robot & I
programme.desc: Kim teaches Kit how to fly a kite. Kit helps Kim by making a really strong wind. Maybe a little too strong...

programme.title: Walter & Dude
programme.desc: Walter and Dude are looking for a triangular item that you wear on your head and fits a clown costume. Is it a helmet or a triangle? Join them as they discover it's a clown's hat!

programme.title: Exploring with Oliver
programme.desc: What will Oliver find at the swimming pool? Join Oliver as he fills the pool with cool water, has fun sipping fresh orange juice and enjoys licking cold ice cream! Come along and help Oliver blow up the beach ball till he floats high up in the air!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Ola, bonjour, hello _ "Hello" has different names _ in English, French or Spanish. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Welcome to the Island
programme.desc: It's a hot day on the island and everyone's thirsty.... But there is just no water to be found. Suddenly a butterfly flies by _ will she be able to help the friends?

programme.title: Hungry Henry
programme.desc: Henry wants to eat tasty hot pear pie but Chef George is out of pears. Join Hungry Henry on his journey to find pears. There aren't any at the grocery store or in the market, but there are pears on trees in the orchard, where they grow! Come along and enjoy fresh pear pie with Henry!

programme.title: What a Wonderful Day
programme.desc: Join the friends as they enjoy a cozy afternoon inside their home as it rains and pours outside! Drink warm tea and bake a tasty cake! Read a book about queens, kings and a magic dragon! Play with toy blocks and dolls and enjoy hearing the raindrops!

programme.title: Gee-Raffa
programme.desc: Squirrel has spinach stuck in his teeth. What can help him take it out? An umbrella? A carrot? Maybe a broom? Luckily, Raffa has the solution.

programme.title: Charlie & the Numbers
programme.desc: On their way to find a horse, Number One the Knight and Charlie encounter various "one" objects including a broom, which Charlie turns into a horse! They then set out to the Numbers Party where they have fun singing and dancing with numbers.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Join Charlie, Lola, Oliver, Hungry Henry, Draco, Billy and Bam Bam as they sing and dance together. Grab a friend or a parent and dance along with them _ round and round and up and down!

programme.title: Teeny & Tiny's Classroom
programme.desc: Come sing along with Teeny and Tiny as they hum a tune, solve riddles, and play guessing games.

programme.title: Giggle Wiggle
programme.desc: Have you ever waddled like a penguin? Come on! Give it a try! Arms like flippers, legs together and... waddle!

programme.title: Snail Trail
programme.desc: Mr. Snail meets a magical chameleon! At first he's green and then he's brown! Come discover that chameleons are amazing animals as they adapt their colours to their surroundings! Come along, see how a chameleon changes colours, climbs a tree and hangs upside down! Enjoy the show!

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The entire family is having fun playing football outside when it starts raining! With a little help from their imagination, the family finds a fun way of playing football indoors!

programme.title: Bug'n'Play to the Rescue
programme.desc: What a pleasant surprise _ there's a rubber duck in the yard! Butterson finds himself stranded in the middle of a puddle on the fubber duck. Luckily, Hop has an idea how to save the day

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: In this fun and popular counting rhyme for kids, the five little hungry mice are climbing a pot of rice to have a yummy feast.

programme.title: Zeina's Detective Agency
programme.desc: A paintbrush arrives at Zeina's doorstep, forgetting what it is used for. Using her detective skill and her best friend Roy, Zeina discovers that a paintbrush is used for raking leaves... is it?

programme.title: Billy Bam Bam
programme.desc: Billy and BamBam have fun making a pile of colourful stones in the garden and playing together on land and sea. Join them as they use a chalkstone to draw arrows and signs and play follow me!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The Itsy-Bitsy Spider is trying to climb the waterspout, but with no luck. The rain keeps washing it out. Perhaps the sun can help the poor little spider?

programme.title: Look What I Found
programme.desc: The friends play in a pond with an umbrella as the umbrella becomes a boat and they go into sea, where they meat dolphins and end up on a beach.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Lola has fun with all your favorite characters from the Tiny Bunch. Come join them as they sing the favorite classic "This Old Man".

programme.title: Dino & the Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Dino & the Egg Hunt

programme.title: Charlie & the Shapes
programme.desc: Oval's balloon gets stuck in the tree. After climbing on the tree to get her balloon she is afraid to come down. Luckily circle comes along and becomes a trampoline

programme.title: The Cuddlies
programme.desc: Join Yum Yum and his friends as they enjoy eating a surprise lunch despite cooking flops. It turns out to be the tastiest lunch since what matters is that they are all together!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: When we meet somebody everywhere we go, we say hello. Hallo, namaste, annyeonghaseyo _ "Hello" has different names _ in German, Hindi or Korean. Let's greet our friends from all around the world with a nice hello in their language.

programme.title: Mike's Bikes
programme.desc: Mike's bike shop is a place everyone goes to when they have a problem to solve. Be it big or small, Mike is always there to help his friends with his unique, quirky, and funny inventions, that put a smile on everyone's face. The series puts a new spin on the phrase – "if at first you don't succeed – try and try again" (and again, and again).

programme.title: Pix & Leo
programme.desc: It's nighttime and the cricket band is playing music! Pix is having trouble sleeping. Will Pix be able to find who is making all that noise?

programme.title: Olly
programme.desc: Vroom vroom! Start your engines, it's show time! Olly the race car driver is up against Snail. Who will win the trophy?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come sing and dance along with Lola, Charlie, Billy and Bam Bam as they touch their head, nose, chin and arms!

programme.title: Beep Beep
programme.desc: Roady and Voom Vam play outside in the mud. After getting covered in leaves, they try to race each other to clean themselves off. When that doesn't work, they find a new machine at the gas station. What does it do? Come find out.

programme.title: Crafty Rafty
programme.desc: Come along to the sea! Meet a barking dog, hear the sounds of a crow and enjoy the cool breeze! Pirates onboard! Ahoy! Join Crafty Rafty as he creates a crow using wood, pinecones and merry berries!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Do you like the sun? All the children want to play with Mr. Golden Sun. Let's ask him to shine down and play with us!

programme.title: My Robot & I
programme.desc: Kim and Kit play football together, but when it's Kit's turn to kick the ball, he discovers it's difficult to kick when you have wheels instead of feet!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Lola and Charlie have fun with the animals on the farm. Join them in this classic rendition of Old McDonald. Don't forget to "moo moo" and "oink oink"!

programme.title: Happy Birthday To You
programme.desc: Make your child a star on BabyTV by creating their very own personalized birthday greeting. Using a digital photo, parents can create a clip for their child which can be viewed online or submitted to BabyTV for the chance of being featured on-air.

programme.title: Mini Matinee
programme.desc: Join the loveable animal friends as they visit Jordan. Khaled offers to paint his sisters' tent. Saeed mixes red and pink petals to create a powder! The wind blows it! Search for it and find a pink palace!

programme.title: Draco
programme.desc: Join Draco as he learns the difference between awake and asleep as he tries to fall asleep by listening to a lullaby and a bedtime story. When his eyes are closed and he doesn't reply when asked if he wants a biscuit, it is clear that he is asleep.

programme.title: The World is a Wonder
programme.desc: Explore the life cycle of cute green frogs! Frogs play in the lake, then go away but leave eggs in the water that hatch into tadpoles! Watch a tadpole grow into a green frog!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Do you like horseback riding, singing and having lots of fun? Join Little Lola, Charlie, Hungry Henry and friends in this fun and cheerful classic folk song. Let's ride together! Yay!

programme.title: Mice builders
programme.desc: Join the mighty mice builders as they work and play! Come sing along and help them build their new home! What's inside the package? A lemon? Of course not! It's a lovely vase!

programme.title: The Jungle Book
programme.desc: Everyone has their own special talent, and today you're going to meet the best talents in the jungle _ Leela, Gray, Adhira, and Indra... but what about Mowgli? What's his special talent?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Bam Bam wants to do everything Billy does _ but it's not always easy! Join the cutest sibling duo as they try to whistle, bounce a basketball and rub their tummy while rubbing their head. Remember _ practice makes perfect!

programme.title: Stick with Mick
programme.desc: Mick wants to plant a flower. Join Mick as he digs up the soil with a shovel and puts it in a wheelbarrow, fills a flower pot with soil and plants a flower. Grab a watering can and help Mick water his beautiful flower!

programme.title: BabyTV Studios
programme.desc: Sporting events are always exciting _ especially when you're participating! Watch the crowd go wild as your child sets a new world record for the long jump!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Five little monkeys jumping on the bed! Can you guess what happens? One falls off and bumps his head! Somebody call the doctor!

programme.title: Maya and Yaya
programme.desc: Maya and Yaya find a toy tractor and argue about who it belongs to. Yaya runs the tractor on the rocks but Maya says the rocks belong to her! Join the two cute elephants as they understand that it's not much fun to play alone. It's best to play together! Come along and play with Maya, Yaya, Momo and the little hedgehog!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Join Little Lola, papa, and farm friends in this cheery BabyTV version of the famous rhyme, Johhny Johnny Yes Papa. Papa offers Lola healthy veggies and dessert instead of catching her eating sugar.

programme.title: Draco
programme.desc: Join Draco as he learns opposites "thin" and "thick" while trying to send Auntie Dragoona pictures by post for her birthday. The envelope he puts in the postbox slot is too thick so he places the pictures into separate thin envelopes. Happy birthday!

programme.title: Let's Dance
programme.desc: Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!

programme.title: Kiku at the Home
programme.desc: It's time to relax, slow down and unwind with Kiku. Calming visuals and soft music are great ways to prepare for bed.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Toto and Robbie fly with their spaceship to wake up a sleepy star so it can shine through the night.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Giraffe and baby giraffe go on a magical journey before bedtime _ flying on a mocking bird, meeting goats, bulls and a dog and riding a merry-go-round. Sweet Dreams.

programme.title: Grandpa Joe's Magical Playground
programme.desc: Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Connect the funny egg and shoes to the white ball! Add a face and hat to create a colourful clown! Come along and have fun dancing with clown! Juggle balls that turn into balloons!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Lola and Charlie have fun with the animals on the farm. Join them in this classic rendition of Old McDonald. Don't forget to "moo moo" and "oink oink"!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Elephant and Hippo go on a picnic on their boat. Elephant manages to catch a fish but ouch! He got bitten! Come count the fish along with Baby, Hippo and Elephant.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come pick potatoes with your favorite BabyTV friends _ Hippo, elephant, Squirrel, Rabbit and Baby!

programme.title: LaLe Ki LoLu
programme.desc: Lale and Lolu explore a colorful castle with a very colorful dragon who loves to play hide and seek.

programme.title: Musical Melody
programme.desc: Join the amazing musicians as they play pleasant sounds of Waltz of the Flowers by Tchaikovsky. Step into the colourful world of music as you have fun riding on a roundabout and watching firecrackers at an amusement park!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The entire family is having fun playing football outside when it starts raining! With a little help from their imagination, the family finds a fun way of playing football indoors!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Playing ball with Draco is fun. When the ball flies over the mountain the bear goes over the mountain to look for it. What will he find?

programme.title: Bath Tubbies
programme.desc: Froggy is blowing soap bubbles in the bathtub! Who's spraying water on him? Ellie is playing ball and Ducky is sleeping on a mattress! Who could it be? Come along and find out! Join the fun and have a great time splashing and laughing in the tub with all the friends and cloud too!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: What's more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters _ Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep and Baby wash, iron and mend their clothes, sweep and scrub the floor and bake bread. And then they all go round the mulberry bush on a cold and frosty morning!

programme.title: Good Night Teddy Bear
programme.desc: Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his adventures with Betty Bear and a bouncy and colourful spring that bounces all over! Join the fun and bounce with the spring on the stairs, in the playground, the amusement park and into the boat on the river!

programme.title: Maya and Yaya
programme.desc: Maya and Yaya are having fun playing hide and go seek in the woods. Where can they be? Maybe behind the bush or behind the tree? Join the two cute elephants as they enjoy playing with each other and with Momo who joins the game and plays with them all day until it's time for the friends to go home!

programme.title: Draco
programme.desc: Join Draco as he learns the difference between "empty" and "full" as he tries to fill up a big box with apples to send to Auntie Dragoona as a birthday present. Draco slowly fills up the empty box with delicious apples till there's just enough!

programme.title: Let's Dance
programme.desc: Get off your couch and start to move! Kids will love to dance and move to energetic music while interacting with animated characters. Come join the beat!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Elephant, Giraffe and Rabbit sure know some moves. Join them as they count and dance!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Baby butterfly picks roses and meets friends along the way _ Hippo, Elephant, Turtle and more. Careful not to sneeze!

programme.title: Stitches
programme.desc: Needles and Racky want to bake a cake for Bouncy's birthday. They mix together flour, eggs, butter and coco powder and bake a delicious cake. Everyone joins in for the wonderful celebration.

programme.title: Grandpa Joe's Magical Playground
programme.desc: Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Connect the round board, poles and triangles to create a wonderful carousel! Come along, take a ride, enjoy the spin and go up and down!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Join Little Lola, papa, and farm friends in this cheery BabyTV version of the famous rhyme, Johhny Johnny Yes Papa. Papa offers Lola healthy veggies and dessert instead of catching her eating sugar.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: All your favorite BabyTV characters are rolling over in the bed. Be careful not to fall out!

programme.title: LaLe Ki LoLu
programme.desc: Lale and Lolu visit a winter wonderland! Roller coasters and Ferris wheels on ice!

programme.title: Musical Melody
programme.desc: Join the joyful musicians as they play beautiful sounds of Hungarian Dance by Brahms. Step into the lively world of music as you have fun riding on a Ferris wheel and sitting on candy canes at an amusement park!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come ride through the town with your favorite BabyTV characters _ Baby Butterfly, Elephant, Giraffe, Sheep, Rabit and Squirrel. Riding a bus has never been more fun!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: In this fun and popular counting rhyme for kids, the five little hungry mice are climbing a pot of rice to have a yummy feast.

programme.title: Good Night Teddy Bear
programme.desc: Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his adventures meeting Ninny the Great magician! Discover what comes out of Ninny's magic hat! Wave the magic wand and see Teddy turn into the tallest bear in the world! Ninny gives Teddy a magic wand so that he can become a magician too!

programme.title: Bath Tubbies
programme.desc: Ellie and Ducky are having fun playing with paint! Ellie wants to sleep but is covered with paint splashes! What shall he do? Join Ellie and Ducky as they clean themselves in the bath. Oh no! Ellie still can't sleep, but once Ducky returns, Ellie can finally fall asleep! Good Night!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Everyone shares in the fun when singing Ten Green Bottles. Baby, Hippo, Elephant, Turtle, Sheep, Rabbit, Squirrel and Giraffe all manage to knock off one of the bottles until there are no bottles left.

programme.title: Grandpa Joe's Magical Playground
programme.desc: Join Grandpa Joe and friends to see the surprise they build with magical parts! Connect the ring, wheels and parts to create a beautiful bicycle! Wear your helmets, blow the horn and join the fun ride!

programme.title: Happy Lights
programme.desc: Soothing music along with images from our surroundings is sure to put your little ones to sleep.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Little Lola has fun staying home playing with her pets. She throws her dog a stick and gives some milk to her cat. Pets are fun!

programme.title: LaLe Ki LoLu
programme.desc: The Orient has never looked so colorful! Lale and Lolu explore the beautiful surroundings.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come join all your favorite BabyTV friends as they have fun dancing like babies, ride in hot-air balloons, meet a magician, and have wagon races

programme.title: Musical Melody
programme.desc: Join the musicians as they play beautiful sounds of On the Beautiful Blue Danube by Strauss. Step into the lively world of music as you have fun underwater.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: What's more fun than eating cakes and breads? Eating them with your favorite BabyTV characters _ Hungry Henry, Billy and Bam Bam, Draco and Oliver!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Daddy Hippo peacefully puts baby Hippo to Bed with this relaxing tune that is sure to get everyone sleepy.

programme.title: Good Night Teddy Bear
programme.desc: Teddy is getting ready for bed! He tells Mama Bear about his adventures with a soap bubble! Come along and join Teddy as he jumps inside the big bubble and floats through his house! What missing items will Teddy discover in his bedroom, on the ceiling light and on the fridge? Float along and see!

programme.title: Bath Tubbies
programme.desc: Ducky, Ellie and Froggy are having fun fishing in the bathtub! Froggy catches something big! What can it be? A treasure chest, of course! What's inside? Come and see! Join the friends as they open the chest and find a sparkling crown! Come along and find out who rescues the crown when it falls in the tub!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: The ants march along carrying cherries, oranges and other goodies from the picnic basket and find shelter from the rain.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Toto, Robbie and Dolly are all busy baking a cake! After pouring all the ingredients in the pan Robbie uses his hand as a whip to whip them all up. Come see as they take the cake out of the oven and top it with sprinkles!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Baby Butterfly and all your favorite friends are here to sing and dance to Here We Go Looby Loo. Come on and join Hippo, Elephant, Giraffe and more and do the Looby loo!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: All My Friends is a fun and cheerful children's rhyme with Lola, Charlie, Henry, Oliver, and Draco signing happily together about friends.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Billy and Bam play with a balloon. When the balloon flies off the siblings run after it. Will they be able to get their balloon back?

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Lola has fun with all your favorite characters from the Tiny Bunch. Come join them as they sing the favorite classic "This Old Man".

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Join Sheep the farmer as he sows and waters the seeds, hoes the weeds and harvests the seeds. Giraffe, Hippo and Rabbit join him in a fun dance.

programme.title: Close Your Eyes
programme.desc: Close your eyes, sit back, and relax. It's time to go to bed.

programme.title: Good Night!
programme.desc: Say good night to the day and recharge yourself with a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Shooting Star
programme.desc: A relaxing journey with BabyTV's loveable charcters.

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Come sing and dance along with Lola, Charlie, Billy and Bam Bam as they touch their head, nose, chin and arms!

programme.title: Songs & Rhymes
programme.desc: Mother Duck goes out with her five little ducklings. Each one is fascinated by something along the way. Luckily, they all find their way back in the end.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Ocean's coral reefs.

programme.title: Flowers
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Time to unwind from the day's activities and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Shooting Star
programme.desc: A relaxing journey with BabyTV's loveable charcters.

programme.title: Milky Way
programme.desc: Time to take it slow and relax.

programme.title: Magic Stars
programme.desc: Let's slow down and change gears.

programme.title: Ocean
programme.desc: Four landscape episodes present a blend of nature and imagination. Join us on a peaceful stroll along a serene river bank, a flowering field or amid the Ocean's coral reefs.
